title: Platypodes
description: Platypodes is a lightweight, standalone mod that adds Platypus to Minecraft!
body:
**Platypodes is a lightweight mod that adds a Platypus as a standalone mob to Minecraft! I also have a resource pack that replaces Axolotls with Platypus [Here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/platylotl)**

# Features

### Platypus
- Clone of the Axolotl
- Found in rivers
- 4 natural spawning, common variants
- 1 rare variant from breeding
- Can be picked up with a water bucket
- Can be bred with Yabbies
### Bucket of Platypus
- Acquired by using a water bucket on a Platypus
- Easily transport Platypus
- Changing item texture based on held variant
### Platypus Spawn Egg
- Spawn a Platypus
### Yabby
- Acquired from fishing, fisherman villagers and village chests
- Used to breed Platypus
